name: BB:UBA : Expired Accounts (Kerberos)
notes: Detects when an account with an expired password attempts to log on to the organizational network.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Expired Accounts (Kerberos) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the event QID is one of the following (5000584) Failure Audit: Kerberos pre-authentication failed, (5000585) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket request failed, (5000581) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was rejected
when any of Status Code (custom) match 0x17
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Expired Accounts (Kerberos) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000584) Failure Audit: Kerberos pre-authentication failed, (5000585) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket request failed, (5000581) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was rejected
AND when any of Status Code (custom) match 0x17
